name: @readme/openapi-schemas
description: JSON Schemas for every version of the OpenAPI Specification
author: ReadMe <support@readme.io> (https://readme.com)

scripts.build: npm run build:schemas && npm run build:typescript
scripts.build:schemas: rm -rf .tmp/ src/schemas/ && git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/OAI/spec.openapis.org.git .tmp/spec.openapis.org && git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/OAI/OpenAPI-Specification.git .tmp/OpenAPI-Specification && tsx src/build-schemas.ts
scripts.test: echo 'Please run tests from the root!' && exit 1
